if (!sendErrorEmail)
{
    _logger.LogInformation(
        "DIA notification email creation skipped because SendErrorEmail is false. LogId: {LogId}, Title: {LogErrorTitle}.",
        logId,
        logErrorTitle);

    return;
}

var configurationValues = await GetConfigurationValuesAsync(
    senderConfigKey,
    recipientConfigKey,
    cancellationToken);

if (configurationValues.Count == 0)
{
    _logger.LogWarning(
        "DIA notification email creation skipped because no sender or recipient configuration values were found. LogId: {LogId}, SenderConfigKey: {SenderConfigKey}, RecipientConfigKey: {RecipientConfigKey}.",
        logId,
        senderConfigKey,
        recipientConfigKey);

    return;
}
